info.title: Alfanumrik Public API

get.summary: List students (roster) for the key's school
get.description: Paginated. Requires scope students.read. Returns id, name, grade, is_active, created_at. Email/phone are NEVER returned (P13).

get.summary: List classes for the key's school

get.description: Requires scope reports.read. Aggregate summaries only — no per-student PII. view=grade (default) rolls up per grade; view=class rolls up per class.
Scope-agnostic: any valid key may browse. Platform content, no tenant data.

ApiKeyAuth.name: x-api-key
ApiKeyAuth.description: School API key (e.g. sk_school_...) issued via the school-admin panel. Scoped + hashed; raw value shown once at creation.

BearerApiKey.description: Alternatively, pass the same school API key as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`.

RateLimitLimit.description: Per-key request budget for the window.

RateLimitRemaining.description: Requests remaining in the current window.

RateLimitReset.description: Unix epoch (seconds) when the window resets.

ReportSummary.description: Aggregate row; shape varies by view (grade vs class). No per-student PII.

Unauthorized.description: Missing, invalid, expired, or inactive API key.

Forbidden.description: Valid key, but it lacks the required scope.

RateLimited.description: Per-key rate limit exceeded. See Retry-After + X-RateLimit-* headers.
